commit.message:
Run real vLLM instances in disaggregated serving demo

Launch two vLLM servers (Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct) as Prefill and Decode,
route requests through the proxy, and send test prompts end-to-end.
Demonstrates the full Mooncake proxy pattern with real LLM inference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add vLLM disaggregated serving proxy for real Mooncake + vLLM deployment

Implements a simplified version of Mooncake's vllm_v1_proxy_server.py that
routes requests between vLLM Prefill (kv_producer) and Decode (kv_consumer)
instances. Supports round-robin load balancing across multiple nodes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: nano-mooncake — Mooncake minimal prototype in ~650 lines of Python

Implements the core design of Mooncake (FAST 2025 Best Paper) as a teaching prototype:
- Transfer Engine with pluggable TCP transport and batch async transfers
- Mooncake Store with Master/Client, two-phase put, replica tracking, and lease eviction
- HTTP metadata server for segment discovery
- Two runnable examples: Prefill/Decode disaggregation and distributed KVCache store

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enable HTTP server observations and histogram distribution so that
http_server_requests_seconds_bucket and _count metrics are exposed
on the actuator/prometheus endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix post creation to use JSON request body instead of query params

Add @RequestBody to FeedController, send content as JSON body in load
test client, and configure Redis ObjectMapper with JavaTimeModule for
proper date serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add verified prediction market trading platform

Four AI agents scan prediction markets, commit predictions on-chain
via Chainlink CRE, and get scored by an independent oracle via
Chainlink Functions. Contracts deployed on Ethereum Sepolia and
verified on Tenderly Virtual TestNet.

- SignalRegistry + AccuracyLedger with real Chainlink DON scoring
- SeptonsVault with Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
- Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor
- Next.js dashboard with RainbowKit wallet connect
- CRE signal recorder workflow
- Deploy scripts for Sepolia and Tenderly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs(formal): Gap 6 — complete Kani K26-K77 harness documentation

Expands formal/kani/README.md from K1-K25 to full K1-K77 catalog:
- K26-K32: IP address verification (loopback, RFC 1918, CGNAT, Teredo)
- K33-K35: Cache safety (key case, staleness, session state)
- K36-K40: Capability delegation (subset, no-escalation, glob)
- K41-K45: Rule checking fail-closed (path, network, IP)
- K46-K48: ResolvedMatch construction equivalence
- K49-K52: Cascading failure circuit breaker (NaN, capacity, rate)
- K53-K55: Constraint evaluation (skip detection, approval)
- K56-K58: Task lifecycle (terminal state, capacity, cancel auth)
- K59-K60: Entropy bounds, grant coverage
- K61-K65: IDNA normalization (fail-closed, wildcard, homoglyphs)
- K66-K68: RwLock poisoning fail-closed
- K69-K70: PII sanitizer (roundtrip, uniqueness)
- K71-K72: Temporal window (expiry, boundary)
- K73-K75: Cascading FSM transitions
- K76-K77: Injection pipeline completeness

Source correspondence table expanded to all 21 modules.
All 6 expert gap analysis items now closed.

Rebuild Crossy Road as probability-based risk game

Each lane is a gamble — press CROSS and you either survive (higher multiplier) or get hit (lose everything). Hit chance scales from 17% to 50% across 10 lanes, with payouts from 1.2x to 60x. Cash out anytime.

commit.message:
ci: re-trigger workflows after skip-ci false positive

The previous commit described '[skip ci]' in the message body as
documentation of what the badge-update commit would say. GitHub
treats '[skip ci]' anywhere in the commit message as a directive,
so CI was silently skipped on that commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add 3¢ slippage tolerance to FOK orders for thin books

FOK (Fill-or-Kill) orders were getting killed because the book didn't
have enough liquidity at the exact limit price. Adding ±3¢ slippage
lets orders sweep through multiple price levels to fill completely.

BUY: limitPrice = ask + 0.03 (capped at 0.99)
SELL: limitPrice = bid - 0.03 (floored at 0.01)

commit.message:
v1.0.361: In-App Notification Banner System

Add notification banners that display announcements at the top of the panel.
Admin creates banners targeting all users, specific resellers, or subscribers.
Resellers with permission can create banners for their own subscribers and
sub-resellers. Banners auto-show/hide based on start/end dates. Customer
portal displays banners for subscribers. Fix impersonation session bug where
axios interceptor always read admin token from localStorage instead of
impersonated token from sessionStorage.

commit.message:
Read local account data: detect Claude Max, ChatGPT Plus, Cursor tier from local files

- New local_accounts.rs: reads account info from locally installed AI apps
  - Claude: parses LevelDB in Local Storage for email, subscription tier (Max/Pro/Free)
  - ChatGPT: counts conversation files, detects Plus subscription from order data
  - Cursor: reads state.vscdb SQLite for email and Stripe membership type
- ServiceInfo now includes is_logged_in, email, conversation_count fields
- ServiceCard shows email and tier badge for detected logged-in accounts
- ServiceDetail shows "Logged in as email" with conversation count
- API key input is now optional (for enhanced token tracking), not required
- No API keys needed - app reads local data from installed AI applications

Improve Open Library lookup: best title match + source link

the Open Library work URL in a new <openlibrary> field in log.xml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Train model on 2010+ data only for better KenPom feature utilization

Pre-2010 games lack KenPom stats, causing those features to default
to 0.0 and be underweighted. Training on 2010+ only (91k games)
improves all metrics and shifts feature importance from win_pct (83%)
to adj_efficiency_margin (31%) and pythag (28%).

commit.message:
fix(ci): retry lint step to handle transient pkl fetch failures (#341)

## Summary
- Wraps the "Check formatting" (`mise run lint`) step in
`nick-fields/retry` with 3 attempts, matching the existing retry pattern
used for bats tests
- Fixes transient CI failures caused by GitHub returning 502 when pkl
fetches the hk config package from GitHub Releases

## Context
https://github.com/jdx/fnox/actions/runs/22832770600/job/66223824636

## Test plan
- [ ] CI passes on this PR itself

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

<!-- CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
---

> [!NOTE]
> **Low Risk**
> CI-only change that alters retry behavior for linting; no production
code paths or security-sensitive logic are affected.
> 
> **Overview**
> Improves CI resilience by wrapping the `Check formatting` step (`mise
run lint`) in `nick-fields/retry` with a 5-minute timeout and up to 3
attempts, matching the retry behavior already used elsewhere in the
workflow.
>

commit.message:
Guardian Pass: security hardening, accessibility fixes, cache alignment

- Add escapeHtml()/safeJsonAttr() and apply to all 30+ external data
  rendering points to prevent XSS via spreadsheet injection
- Add _redirects to block 136 sensitive files from public Cloudflare Pages
- Add CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options and other security headers
- Fix service worker STATIC_ASSETS cache version mismatch
- Convert interactive divs to semantic buttons with keyboard handlers
- Add ARIA roles, labels, and expanded state to modals, accordions,
  dropdowns, and navigation menus
- Add skip link target, fix duplicate h1, add video captions track
- Bump asset versions to 1.9.71 and cache version to v1.9.50
